narrative:
Salem 3 (Oak Harbor) (precinct in Ottawa County) has 630 registered voters, with 62.4% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 23.5% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 14.1%, a clear Republican lean of 9.4 percentage points.
